TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ken_Boyd, title = Ken_Boyd, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ken_Boyd} }

S.FORM: Ken Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 3, Ken Boyd, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ken Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 3, Ken Boyd, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ken βoj* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ken βoj*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
